tasks.label: Give notice to your landlord per your tenancy agreement
tasks.dueText: Check your agreement for required notice period

tasks.label: Arrange professional cleaning if required by your tenancy agreement
Set up Royal Mail post redirection to your new address
Notify utility providers (gas, electricity, water) of your leaving date
Arrange final meter readings for moving day
Take final meter readings (gas, electricity, water)
Return all keys to landlord or letting agent
Photograph the property condition for your records
Check property is clean and in good condition
Confirm forwarding address with landlord or letting agent
Close or transfer your council tax account
Request deposit return in writing
tasks.dueText: Landlord should return within 10 days of agreement

tasks.label: Cancel or transfer broadband / internet contract
Cancel or transfer home contents insurance
Update your address on subscriptions and services
